sentence: 我们参观了当地的历史纪念馆。
pinyin: Wǒmen cānguān le dāngdì de lìshǐ jìniànguǎn.
english: We visited the local history memorial museum.

sentence: 他受伤后肢体活动受到了限制。
pinyin: Tā shòu shāng hòu zhī tǐ huó dòng shòu dào le xiàn zhì.
english: After the injury, his limb movement was restricted.

sentence: 秋天院子里开满了菊花。
pinyin: Qiūtiān yuànzi lǐ kāi mǎn le júhuā.
english: In autumn the courtyard was full of blooming chrysanthemums.

sentence: 每天适度运动对身体很有好处。
pinyin: Měi tiān shì dù yùn dòng duì shēn tǐ hěn yǒu hǎo chù.
english: Moderate exercise every day is very beneficial for your health.

sentence: 园区主要吸引高新技术企业入驻。
pinyin: Yuánqū zhǔyào xīyǐn gāoxīn jìshù qǐyè rùzhù.
english: The park mainly attracts high-tech companies to set up there.
